meta.description: Information about the service discovery discoverer.

kind.description: Runtime discoverer kind, matching the registry name and stock conf filename (e.g. 'snmp', 'docker', 'k8s', 'http', 'net_listeners').

name.description: Display name shown in docs, sidebar, and the SD hub page.

tagline.description: One-line summary of what this discoverer finds, used in the SD hub page table. Should fit on one line in a markdown table cell.

link.description: Reference link for the underlying technology or protocol (Wikipedia page, vendor page, RFC, etc.).

description.description: What this discoverer does, what it monitors, and when to use it.

how_it_works.description: Optional beginner on-ramp: a short, concrete explanation of the discoverer's lifecycle (probe -> sysinfo/metadata read -> rule match -> job creation). Rendered as '### How it works' under Overview.

limitations.description: Optional explanation of notable limitations or behavior.

verify.description: Optional 'Verify discovery worked' section, rendered as a top-level h2 between Service Rules and Troubleshooting. Use it to tell users where discovered jobs appear in the UI, how to read discoverer logs, and what success looks like.

list.description: Concrete things the user can check to confirm discovery works.

name.description: Check title (e.g. 'Confirm targets are appearing', 'Read the discoverer log').
Variable name as used in templates, e.g. '.Port' or '.SysInfo.Name'.

type.description: Variable type (typically 'string'). Document empty/zero-value semantics in description.

description.description: What the variable holds, where it comes from, and what to expect when the value is empty or unset.

services_evaluation_step.description: One bullet describing rule evaluation behavior for this discoverer.

config.description: YAML snippet showing one or more entries from the 'services:' array.

services.description: How 'services:' rules turn discovered targets into collector jobs for this discoverer. Note: shared rule semantics, the full template-function reference, and 'config_template' rendering rules live on the SD hub page; per-discoverer pages should focus on what is specific to this discoverer.

description.description: Introductory text. Should explain what a rule is for THIS discoverer and link to the hub page for the shared model.

evaluation.description: Optional discoverer-specific notes on rule evaluation order, skip-rules, and multi-job behavior. The shared semantics belong on the hub page; use this only when this discoverer differs (or when a clarification is worth repeating in context).

template_variables.description: Discoverer-specific variables available inside 'match' and 'config_template'. Do NOT list shared template helper functions (sprig, glob, match, etc.); those live on the hub page.

examples.description: Worked examples of 'services:' rules for this discoverer.

entry.description: Metadata for a single service discovery discoverer.
